chapter_goal: Present Bloch-type conjectures as a filtration story linking geometric genus, Chow groups, and Fourier operations on abelian varieties.
checks: finite Fourier matrix is unitary after normalization
Pontryagin convolution diagonalizes under Fourier transform
lab: Convolve two toy cycle vectors on a finite abelian group and compare before and after Fourier transform.
library_routes: NumPy for finite Fourier matrix checks
pitfalls: treating conjectural filtrations as established in all cases
reading pg=0 as the only hypothesis in surface classification
proof_moves: relate vanishing Hodge pieces to expected Chow simplification
organize cycle groups by conjectural filtrations
diagonalize operations on abelian varieties using Fourier transform
visual_focus: A Chow filtration tower and a finite Fourier transform grid show how cycle operations split into graded pieces.
